languages.text: "Меткое замечание, Лорд-капитан! С гордостью отвечу, что был удостоен чести служить рядом с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} еще на родной планете — среди техножрецов Януса есть целые отделения, возглавляемые генеторами. Во время сложных операций знания Официо Медике были для них незаменимы, ибо в священные компетенции генеторов не входит забота о бренной плоти пациентов. Тут в ритуал волей-неволей приходится включиться опытному медикарию. Так мы и нашли общий язык. Смею заметить, что почтенные генеторы не допускают меня к самим машинам, так как никто, кроме них, не сведущ в таинствах оперирования ими. Я заведую сугубо... органической стороной вопроса".

traits.locale_text: "Меткое замечание, Лорд-капитан! С гордостью отвечу, что овладел некоторыми навыками общения с {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} еще на родной планете — среди техножрецов Януса есть целые отделения, возглавляемые генеторами. Во время сложных операций знания Официо Медике были для них незаменимы — Машину ведь нужно как-то соединить с плотью. Тут в ритуал волей-неволей приходится включиться опытному медикарию. Так мы и нашли общий язык".

languages.text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain! I am proud to tell you that I had the honour of serving alongside members of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} back on my home planet. Among the Tech-Priests of Janus, there are entire divisions headed by Genetors. The knowledge of the Officio Medicae was essential during more complicated procedures, for the sacred remit of Genetors does not include tending to patients' mortal bodies. That is when an experienced medicae must be brought into the ritual. And thus, we found some common ground. I must stress that the esteemed Genetors do not permit me direct access to the machines, since none but they themselves are versed in the mysteries of operating them. My purview is limited to... the organic aspect."
languages.original_text: "Меткое замечание, Лорд-капитан! languages.text: 「もちろん！何を知りたいのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Of course! What exactly do you wish to know?"

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん！何を知りたいのですか？」

languages.text: "Zekice bir gözlem Lord Kaptan! Kendi gezegenimde {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} mensuplarıyla hizmet etme onuruna eriştiğimi söylemekten gurur duyuyorum. Janus'un Tekno Rahipleri arasında başında Genetörlerin olduğu koca bölümler vardır. Daha karmaşık prosedürler sırasında Officio Medicae bilgisi esastı. Zira Genetörlerin kutsal yetki alanı, hastaların ölümlü bedenleriyle ilgilenmeyi kapsamaz. İşte o zaman deneyimli bir sıhhiye, ayine dâhil edilir. Kısacası bu şekilde ortak bir zemin bulduk."
languages.original_text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain! I am proud to tell you that I had the honour of serving alongside members of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} back on my home planet. Among the Tech-Priests of Janus, there are entire divisions headed by Genetors. The knowledge of the Officio Medicae was essential during more complicated procedures, for the sacred remit of Genetors does not include tending to patients' mortal bodies. That is when an experienced medicae must be brought into the ritual. And thus, we found some common ground."

traits.locale_text: "Zekice bir gözlem Lord Kaptan! Kendi gezegenimde {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} mensuplarıyla hizmet etme onuruna eriştiğimi söylemekten gurur duyuyorum. Janus'un Tekno Rahipleri arasında başında Genetörlerin olduğu koca bölümler vardır. Daha karmaşık prosedürler sırasında Officio Medicae bilgisi esastı. Zira Genetörlerin kutsal yetki alanı, hastaların ölümlü bedenleriyle ilgilenmeyi kapsamaz. İşte o zaman deneyimli bir sıhhiye, ayine dâhil edilir. Kısacası bu şekilde ortak bir zemin bulduk."

languages.text: «Una observación astuta, Lord Capitán. Tengo el orgullo de poder contarle que se me otorgó el privilegio de trabajar junto a algunos miembros del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} en mi planeta natal. Entre los tecnosacerdotes de Janus, había divisiones enteras encabezadas por genetores. El conocimiento del Officio Medicae era esencial en los procesos más complejos. A fin de cuentas, el sagrado ámbito de los genetores no incluye el cuidado de los cuerpos mortales de los pacientes. Ahí es donde los expertos en medicae participan en el ritual. Y por eso encontramos algo de terreno común».
languages.original_text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain! I am proud to tell you that I had the honour of serving alongside members of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} back on my home planet. Among the Tech-Priests of Janus, there are entire divisions headed by Genetors. The knowledge of the Officio Medicae was essential during more complicated procedures, for the sacred remit of Genetors does not include tending to patients' mortal bodies. That is when an experienced medicae must be brought into the ritual. And thus, we found some common ground."

traits.locale_text: «Una observación astuta, Lord Capitán. Tengo el orgullo de poder contarle que se me otorgó el privilegio de trabajar junto a algunos miembros del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} en mi planeta natal. Entre los tecnosacerdotes de Janus, había divisiones enteras encabezadas por genetores. El conocimiento del Officio Medicae era esencial en los procesos más complejos. A fin de cuentas, el sagrado ámbito de los genetores no incluye el cuidado de los cuerpos mortales de los pacientes. Ahí es donde los expertos en medicae participan en el ritual. Y por eso encontramos algo de terreno común».

languages.text: “很敏锐的观察，舰长大人！我可以自豪地告诉您，在母星上，我有幸与{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}的成员共事过。在加努斯的技术神甫中，有整支由基因士统率的部门。在更复杂的手术中，医疗部的知识至关重要，因为基因士的神圣职责并不包括照顾病人的肉体。这时候，就必须请经验丰富的医务官加入仪式。也正因如此，我们找到了彼此的共同点。”
languages.original_text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain! I am proud to tell you that I had the honour of serving alongside members of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} back on my home planet. Among the Tech-Priests of Janus, there are entire divisions headed by Genetors. The knowledge of the Officio Medicae was essential during more complicated procedures, for the sacred remit of Genetors does not include tending to patients' mortal bodies. That is when an experienced medicae must be brought into the ritual. And thus, we found some common ground."

traits.locale_text: “很敏锐的观察，舰长大人！我可以自豪地告诉您，在母星上，我有幸与{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}的成员共事过。在加努斯的技术神甫中，有整支由基因士统率的部门。在更复杂的手术中，医疗部的知识至关重要，因为基因士的神圣职责并不包括照顾病人的肉体。这时候，就必须请经验丰富的医务官加入仪式。也正因如此，我们找到了彼此的共同点。”

languages.text: « Finement observé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Sachez que, pour ma plus grande fierté, j'ai servi auprès de membres de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} sur ma planète d'origine. Parmi les technoprêtres de Janus, des divisions entières ont à leur tête des genetors. Les connaissances de l'Officio Medicae ont joué un rôle majeur lors des procédures les plus complexes, car le soin des corps mortels n'entre pas dans les attributions sacrées des genetors. C'est là qu'il devient nécessaire d'intégrer un officier de medicae dans le rituel, et c'est aussi ce qui nous a permis de trouver un terrain d'entente. »
languages.original_text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain! I am proud to tell you that I had the honour of serving alongside members of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} back on my home planet. Among the Tech-Priests of Janus, there are entire divisions headed by Genetors. The knowledge of the Officio Medicae was essential during more complicated procedures, for the sacred remit of Genetors does not include tending to patients' mortal bodies. That is when an experienced medicae must be brought into the ritual. And thus, we found some common ground."

traits.locale_text: « Finement observé, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! Sachez que, pour ma plus grande fierté, j'ai servi auprès de membres de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} sur ma planète d'origine. Parmi les technoprêtres de Janus, des divisions entières ont à leur tête des genetors. Les connaissances de l'Officio Medicae ont joué un rôle majeur lors des procédures les plus complexes, car le soin des corps mortels n'entre pas dans les attributions sacrées des genetors. C'est là qu'il devient nécessaire d'intégrer un officier de medicae dans le rituel, et c'est aussi ce qui nous a permis de trouver un terrain d'entente. »

languages.text: "Eine scharfe Beobachtung, Lord Captain! Ich bin stolz, Euch sagen zu können, dass ich die Ehre hatte, mit Angehörigen des {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} zu kommunizieren. Unter den Techpriestern von Janus gibt es ganze Abteilungen unter der Leitung von Genetoren. Das Wissen des Officio Medicae war bei komplizierteren Prozeduren entscheidend, denn der heilige Auftrag der Genetoren umfasst die Behandlung der sterblichen Hüllen von Patienten nicht. Das ist der Moment, in dem ein erfahrener Medicae in das Ritual eingebunden werden muss. Und so fanden wir einen gemeinsamen Nenner."
languages.original_text: "An astute observation, Lord Captain!
